FreeBSD hamlet.nectar.com 4.1-STABLE FreeBSD 4.1-STABLE #0: Sat Sep  9 22:17:15 CDT 2000     root@hamlet.nectar.com:/var/obj/usr/src/sys/HAMLET  i386

cisco Aironet 342 PC Card

>Description:

	cisco Aironet PC Cards have a different manufacture/model
	name than originally.

>How-To-Repeat:

	

>Fix:

# Cisco 340/342 11Mbps 802.11 wireless NIC
card "Cisco Systems" "340 Series Wireless LAN Adapter"
        config  auto "an" ?
        insert  /etc/pccard_ether $device
        remove  /sbin/ifconfig $device delete

>Release-Note:
>Audit-Trail:
>Unformatted:
